heading: Direct appropriation
label: 9061 Direct appropriation
notes: References in TextThis part, referred to in subsec. (a), was in the original “this subtitle”, meaning subtitle A (§§ 4001–4029) of title IV of div. A of , known as the Coronavirus Economic Stabilization Act of 2020, which is classified principally to this part. For complete classification of subtitle A to the Code, see , set out as a Short Title note under , and Tables.Pub. L. 116–136section 4001 of Pub. L. 116–136section 9001 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, there is appropriated, out of amounts in the Treasury not otherwise appropriated, to the fund established under , $500,000,000,000 to carry out this part.section 5302(a)(1) of title 31

children.label: A
children.text: modifications, restructurings, or other amendments of loans, loan guarantees, or other investments in accordance with ; andsection 9063(b)(1) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: exercising any options, warrants, or other investments made prior to ; andJanuary 1, 2021

children.label: C
children.text: paying costs and administrative expenses as provided in .section 9042(f) of this title

children.heading: Deficit reduction
children.label: 2 Deficit reduction
children.text: On , any funds described in paragraph (1) that are remaining shall be transferred to the general fund of the Treasury to be used for deficit reduction.January 1, 2026
